_comment: DKG MCP read tools. Invoked via pnpm exec so the workspace-local tsx binary (devDependency of the root package) runs the TypeScript source directly. This avoids the fresh-clone footgun where dist/ is gitignored and the auto-loaded MCP server would 404 before anyone ran `pnpm build`. Config (API, token, project) comes from .dkg/config.yaml in the workspace root.
